name: Big Brother: Late and Live
overview: Big Brother hosts AJ Odudu and Will Best present from a studio just a stone's throw from the Big Brother house, featuring celebrity guests and a live studio audience.

seasons.name: Series 1
seasons.overview: Recapping The 20th Overall Season of Big Brother in The United Kingdom

episodes.name: The Launch: Day 1 Recap
episodes.overview: Filmed at the Big Brother house in front of a live studio audience, the go-to destination for the first live interviews with evictees, exclusive camera run access, celebrity guest commentary, debates, and weekly nomination results.
